texto: They were two ruined souls doomed to wander their minds, if not the earth, trying to remember from whence they came.
explicacao: Citação de Tania James sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “They were two ruined souls doomed to wander their minds, if not the earth, trying to remember fro…” articula reflexao, identity, ruined em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

texto: These stories are important to me, not because they happen to be about South Asians, but because they’re circling around a certain strain of loneliness that goes deeper than cultural dissonance, that has to do with the yearning to connect with someone else, or with some unreachable vision of home.
explicacao: Citação de Tania James sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “These stories are important to me, not because they happen to be about South Asians, but because …” articula reflexao, identity, because em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e reflexao.

texto: As she continues to answer questions about her employment, all these words mean little more to her now than I AM SOPHISTICATED, I AM WORTHY, I AM SOPHISTICATED, I AM WORTHY. She attempts the posture of a politician's wife, shoulders held back, dignifIed yet modest.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Tania James sobre temas ligados a autoestima. A afirmação “As she continues to answer questions about her employment, all these words mean little more to he…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a autoestima, dignity, immigration, útil em momentos de immigration.
